codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers feature requirements with pause_task(), resume_task(), inject_instruction(), and modify_scope() APIs accessible via CLI and Unix socket. State machine properly implements Paused state with state preservation for resume. TaskScope struct correctly stores original scope for restore. 17 tests added covering success and error paths.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed AGENTS.md conventions precisely: crate-scoped validation with cargo check/test/clippy, workspace build only for final verification. No deviations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Verification commands in handoff: 'cargo build --workspace', 'cargo test -p swell-daemon', 'cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings'

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed Rust skill guidelines - no ownership pitfalls, proper error handling with thiserror, async traits used correctly. The inject_instruction and modify_scope implementations use idiomatic Rust patterns.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: state_machine.rs uses Result<SwellError> returns, ? operator for propagation, proper match guards for state transitions

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used standard services.yaml commands (cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy) without deviation. No custom commands or services started.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows standard cargo commands only

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly implemented state machine with proper state transition guards and state preservation. The paused_from_state field correctly tracks which state to resume to (Executing or Validating).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: state_machine.rs: pause_task stores task.paused_from_state = Some(task.state) before transitioning to Paused

summary: Feature passes scrutiny. Implementation is complete, well-tested, and follows all project conventions. All four expected behaviors (pause_task, resume_task, inject_instruction, modify_scope) are implemented with proper state machine integration. CLI and socket accessibility verified via handlers in commands.rs. 17 tests cover all success and error paths. No blocking issues found.
